    "Intermittent shaft alignment issue reported but not captured in the provided clip",
    "Lack of trend logs, load readings, or repeat test data to isolate the failure mode from normal cycling"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Install continuous vibration monitoring or trend logging on the operating asset",
    "Perform a repeat laser alignment check under hot and cold conditions to verify thermal growth calculations",
    "Review load and process cycling data against API 686 piping strain and alignment tolerances"
  ],
  "rationale": "The reported symptom is intermittent and the provided evidence starts after the symptom has stopped. Without trend logs, load readings, or repeat test data, it is impossible to distinguish a genuine alignment failure mode from normal operational cycling or thermal transient states.",
  "references": [
    "API 686 Chapter 4 (Mounting Plate and Alignment)",
    "Laser Alignment System Operating Manuals"
  ]
}
